title: Arkansas Victory Field Framework
doctrine: Every campaign event must leave behind more volunteers, more leaders, more voter registrations, more neighborhood teams, and stronger local infrastructure than existed before the event.
catalyst: Campaign schedules an event — software and teams generate timeline, assignments, communications, and success metrics from that decision.
not_in_scope_yet: New CIWS role cards beyond existing FunctionalRoleId set

local_event_committee.title: Volunteer Recruitment Lead
local_event_committee.note: Works with Central Volunteer Management / Field Manager

local_event_committee.title: Community/Social Lead
local_event_committee.note: Clubs, churches, orgs, businesses, influencers; after-event social

local_event_committee.title: Media Lead
local_event_committee.note: Newspaper/radio — tracked in Field Plan; CIWS card deferred

local_event_committee.title: Logistics Lead
local_event_committee.note: Venue/permits — tracked in Field Plan; CIWS card deferred

phases.name: Event Activation
phases.summary: On event approval, activate local event committee and central campaign counterparts.

phases.name: Local Intelligence
phases.summary: Venue, parking, weather backup, demographics, orgs, media, influencers, coalition partners — before outreach.

phases.name: Communications Launch
phases.summary: Waves: announcement/Kelly-is-coming/save-the-date; local media & community calendars; reminder cascade to event day.

phases.name: Field Operation
phases.summary: Saturday-prior door hangers; phone/text banks; postcards; literature and org visits.

phases.name: Earned Media
phases.summary: Two weeks out: newspaper ads, radio where budget allows, LTEs, interviews, advisories.

phases.name: Event Experience Funnel
phases.summary: Arrival → sign-in → registration check → Meet Kelly → Power of 5 invite → role choice → training → follow-up. Nobody leaves without a next step.

phases.name: Power of Five Launch
phases.summary: Primary outcome of every event: launch neighborhood teams (5×5×5) with training, materials, schedule, channel, recognition.

phases.name: Volunteer Leadership Ladder
phases.summary: Interested → attended → P5 → volunteer → reliable → neighborhood → precinct → city → county → regional.

phases.name: Voter Registration Operation
phases.summary: Goals by county/city/campus/neighborhood; events, campuses, doors, faith, markets.

phases.name: Community Partnerships
phases.summary: Leave working relationships (Dem/Lib where appropriate, civic, NAACP, colleges, faith, labor, business).

phases.name: October Strike Team Saturdays
phases.summary: County-wide canvass + community cookout staging; synergy with local candidates.

phases.name: Election Operations
phases.summary: Every poll covered: observer, greeter, signs, relief, supply, escalation, county/regional/state command.

phases.name: Post-Event Continuity
phases.summary: 24h thanks + P5 invites; 1 week orientation; 1 month metrics and next activity.

county_campaign_command.purpose: Operational dashboard watching the county in real time — not a new social rank.

next_drill_down: County and city playbooks inherit this framework; plug in venues, demographics, orgs, media, leaders, and priorities without rebuilding the hierarchy.
